query: Verizon job posting (artificial intelligence OR machine learning OR generative AI OR LLM OR data scientist)

results.title: Principal Conversational & Agentic AI Architect, Irving, United States of America | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Principal Conversational & Agentic AI Architect, Irving, United States of America | Verizon Careers
[...]
# Principal Conversational & Agentic AI Architect
[...]
We are seeking a highly skilled Conversational & Agentic AI Architect to design, build, and optimize enterprise-grade conversational AI and multi-agent solutions within a Consulting organization. This role demands hands-on technical architecture, a product-led engineering mindset, and extensive expertise in both speech science and Generative AI. You will be responsible for consulting with customers to create seamless, multi-turn conversational experiences that move beyond rigid decision trees into dynamic, agentic interactions, successfully integrating complex backend systems while managing both sophisticated NLU models and LLMs.Key Responsibilities
[...]
Agentic & Conversational Architecture: Architect and maintain complex conversational flows, transitioning from traditional State-Based Flows and event handlers to modern Generative AI and multi-agent orchestrated solutions (e.g., Dialogflow Playbooks, Vertex AI , or Microsoft Copilot Studio).
[...]
LLM Engineering & NLU Design: Manage complex intent taxonomies capable of handling 200+ unique intents without overlapping, ensuring high Intent Precision & Recall while minimizing False Positives. Lead efforts in LLM fine-tuning, prompt engineering, distillation, and evaluating small/efficient models for latency-sensitive voice applications.
[...]
Collision Analysis & Tuning: Conduct regular conflict detection and ambiguity testing to resolve intents that compete for the same user phrases, while securing AI models against prompt manipulation and data vulnerabilities.
[...]
STT, STS & Multi-Modal Extraction: Tune Speech-to-Text (STT) and Speech-to-Speech adaptations and hints to improve recognition for industry-specific jargon, and design complex custom entities to extract critical data from unstructured speech and generative interactions.
[...]
System Integration & Backend: Build and deploy robust webhooks and serverless backend services using Node.js or Python to connect virtual agents with third-party APIs, CRMs, and databases. Implement model serving infrastructure and scalable cross-platform AI solutions.
[...]
Performance Benchmarking & ROI: Build "Golden Sets" for automated regression testing to measure F1-scores across model versions, and use tools like BigQuery to analyze real-world "No-Match" logs. Conduct Return-on-Investment (ROI) analysis of AI-powered solutions and interpret telemetry data to drive continuous product improvement.
[...]
Proficiency in modern programming languages and frameworks such as Python, JavaScript, Java, Next JS, Node.js, React js Strong working experience with GenAI, LLM Models, MCP, Vector DB, RAG, Vertex AI, Agentic AI frameworks like NGA, ADK or LangChain/LangGraph, creating AI agents.
[...]
Experience with Cloud platforms like GCP, Azure or AWS and cloud technologies like OpenStack, Terraform, Ansible or Chef
[...]
Experience working with LLM observability, analytics, evaluations, testing and annotation using tools like LangSmith, LangFuse, Streamlit, Arize or similar tools.
[...]
Experience working with AI/ML development.
[...]
Even better if you have one or more of the following:
[...]
Background in Computational Linguistics or Data Science.
[...]
Certifications such as Microsoft Agentic AI Business Solutions Architect, Google Cloud Professional Architect, or Machine Learning Engineer.
[...]
Experience with Generative and NLU design.
[...]
Experience using Python libraries (Pandas/NumPy) for large-scale utterance data cleaning and optimization.
[...]
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines for automated agent deployment and modern

results.title: AI Engineer - Go To Market, Temple Terrace, United States of America | Verizon Careers
highlights:
AI Engineer - Go To Market, Temple Terrace, United States of America | Verizon Careers
[...]
# AI Engineer - Go To Market
[...]
- Temple Terrace, Florida
- Rolling Meadows, Illinois
- San Diego, California
[...]
’ll be doing...
[...]
You will be working to design, deploy, and optimize Generative AI solutions that eliminate friction in our Go-To-Market (GTM) engine. You will move beyond traditional data analytics and modeling to build agentic workflows and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems, applying the latest advancements in Foundation Models to create intuitive, AI-native tools that supercharge our sales and marketing teams.
[...]
Building and refining LLM-powered features and autonomous agents to enhance our revenue capabilities.
[...]
Designing and implementing RAG pipelines to connect our proprietary data (e.g., playbooks, product documentation, past successful call transcripts) with large language models for high-accuracy, context-aware outputs.
[...]
Exploring and eliminating other GTM friction points by rapid prototyping AI solutions for lead enrichment, personalized outreach, and CRM automation.
[...]
Integrating AI workflows into the modern sales stack (e.g., Salesforce, Gong) to ensure seamless adoption by our sales reps.
[...]
Developing and maintaining production-grade infrastructure for AI orchestration, including prompt management, low-latency streaming APIs, and model evaluation frameworks.
[...]
Rapid "Vibe Coding" & Prototyping: Use tools like Claude Code, Codex, Lovable, LangSmith Agent Builder, to go from idea to deployed full-stack MVP in days, not weeks.
[...]
You are a builder at heart with a "hacker" mindset and a passion for revenue operations. You are eager to bridge the gap between raw model capabilities and polished tools that actually help sales teams win. You are proactive, iterate quickly, and enjoy the challenge of "taming" non-deterministic AI outputs in high-stakes, real-time environments.
[...]
You’ll need to have:
[...]
Strong proficiency in Python/TypeScript and experience building web services or integrating complex APIs (especially CRM, VoIP, or sales engagement platforms).
[...]
Solid understanding of the LLM stack, including experience with orchestration frameworks (e.g., LangChain/LangGraph, Strands Agents, CrewAI).
[...]
Knowledge of modern AI concepts: Prompt Engineering, few-shot learning, and the difference between fine-tuning and RAG.
[...]
Experience with standard software development tools (Git, Docker) and CI/CD processes.
[...]
A product-oriented and revenue-focused mindset: the ability to deeply empathize with a BDR's workflow and design AI outputs that are instantly actionable during a live call.
[...]
Fearless "Hacker" Mindset: You aren't afraid of code you didn't write. You are comfortable generating 80% of your code with AI and crafting the remaining 20% with high precision.
[...]
Even better if you have one or more of the following:
[...]
Domain expertise in Go-To-Market, RevOps, or Sales tech stacks (Salesforce, Hubspot, Gong, Apollo, Clearbit).
[...]
Experience building real-time audio/speech-to-text processing pipelines (e.g., WebRTC, Deepgram, Whisper) for live transcription and analysis.
[...]
Contributions to open-source AI projects or a portfolio of "weekend" prototypes built with an AI-native toolchain
[...]
Exposure to cloud-based AI services (e.g., AWS Bedrock, Azure AI Studio, or GCP Vertex AI).
[...]
Experience with Vector Databases and semantic search concepts.
[...]
Experience with AI evaluation and observability tools
[...]
Knowledge of "agentic" design patterns
[...]

[...]

results.title: Sr Engr Cslt-Data Science, Madhapur, India | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Sr Engr Cslt-Data Science, Madhapur, India | Verizon Careers
[...]
# Sr Engr Cslt-Data Science
[...]
As a Consultant (Analytics) you will be a pivotal player in modernizing telecom financial operations. Bridging the gap between implementation and architectural strategy, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced AI/ML, Generative AI, and Agentic AI solutions tailored for the finance domain. Your work will transition complex financial workflows—such as Forecasting as a Service, Explainability framework, Funnel Forecasting, Customer Profitability etc., and also performing analyses that impact Bad Debt, Cash flow, Credit Score cut models, etc., among others—into automated, intelligent, and proactive systems.
[...]
You will own the end-to-end lifecycle of critical AI models while translating complex technical results into compelling business narratives for finance leadership.
[...]
Design and deploy core AI/ML and Generative AI solutions to optimize financial operations.
[...]
Build and orchestrate Agentic AI workflows to automate multi-step financial analysis and decision-making processes.
[...]
Utilize foundational models and AI assistants (e.g., Claude, GitHub Copilot) to rapidly prototype, iterate, and deliver agile AI solutions to meet dynamic business needs.
[...]
Engineer robust data pipelines and write complex SQL/BigQuery queries to extract and transform large-scale financial datasets using GCP and Python.
[...]
Act as a data storyteller—synthesizing complex AI/ML model outputs into clear, actionable, and prescriptive insights for non-technical finance stakeholders.
[...]
Implement MLOps best practices to ensure continuous integration, deployment, and monitoring of financial AI models in production environments.
[...]
Driving data-derived insights across the business domain by developing advanced statistical models, machine learning algorithms and computational algorithms based on business initiatives.
[...]
Your primary focus will be transforming traditional financial operations into a proactive, AI-driven organization. You are a hands-on builder who thrives at the intersection of core ML, cutting-edge GenAI, and business strategy. You have a knack for rapid prototyping and possess the communication skills required to explain the "why" and "how" of AI to business leaders.
[...]
You'll need to have:
[...]
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field or four or more years of work experience.
[...]
Three or more years of experience practicing data science, AI engineering, or machine learning, with a strong focus on core AI/ML, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks.
[...]
Experience with all phases of end-to-end Analytics project, such as (but not limited to): Ingestion, Munging, Model Building, Validation, Operationalization, Monitoring
[...]
Strong programming proficiency in Python and advanced SQL.
[...]
Proven experience working within cloud platforms (Teradata/ GCP) and using tools like BigQuery for large-scale data processing.
[...]
Demonstrated experience in rapid prototyping and building solutions leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI tools (e.g., Claude, Copilot).
[...]
Exceptional data storytelling and communication skills, with a proven ability to translate complex technical concepts into confident financial business decisions.
[...]
Master’s) in Computer Science, Statistics, Data Science, or a related field.
[...]
Hands-on familiarity with specific Agentic AI and orchestration frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex).
[...]
Experience in designing and deploying end-to-end MLOps and LLMOps pipelines.
[...]
A strong understanding of financial forecasting models, anomaly detection algorithms, and time-series analysis.
[...]
Director - AI/ML Engineering

results.title: Associate Director of AI Product Development, Irving, United States of America | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Associate Director of AI Product Development, Irving, United States of America | Verizon Careers
[...]
# Associate Director of AI Product Development
[...]
- Irving, Texas
[...]
- Basking Ridge, New Jersey
[...]
The Technology Product Development platform services team is an exciting center of excellence and a catalyst to Verizon's future, dedicated to creating networks that move the world forward through the power of Artificial Intelligence and platform services. We are seeking an Associate Director to spearhead the company's product development-focused AI initiatives. This role centers on building and managing a dedicated AI team and taking full ownership of the innovation pipeline, from prototyping, tooling, standards, testing to execution. The ideal candidate will operate with significant autonomy to leverage their initiative and drive progress, while working in close alignment with executive leadership to ensure strategic goals are met within a clear reporting structure. This position requires a leader who can establish a clear vision, execute on priorities, and champion a culture of AI-driven innovation.
[...]
Leading development-focused AI initiatives, taking ownership of key projects from prototyping through to execution and leveraging personal initiative to drive progress.
[...]
Building, managing, and mentoring a high-performing team of AI specialists, fostering a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.
[...]
Developing, owning, and championing the organization's AI product technology roadmap, ensuring it aligns with broader business objectives.
[...]
Driving a strategic and transformational approach for integrating next-generation AI into our products and platforms.
[...]
Frequently representing the company's AI technology positions and priorities with external partners, research institutions, and public-facing entities.
[...]
Identifying and recommending technology partnerships to drive product value, collaborating with internal teams to formalize these partnerships.
[...]
Proactively managing executive-level meetings through briefing materials, clear positions, and status updates on AI strategy and innovation.
[...]
Driving financial discipline related to AI technology acquisition and implementation.
[...]
Experience in the field of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.
[...]
Experience in the application of artificial intelligence to the development of functioning systems and product development.
[...]
Solid understanding of the current AI/ML landscape, including state-of-the-art models, frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch), and cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).
[...]
Experience with a wide array of AI domains (e.g., NLP, Computer Vision, Reinforcement Learning, Generative AI); prior experience implementing these solutions into commercial products is a strong plus.
[...]
Experience in developing AI teams and training team members in artificial intelligence and data science.
[...]
Familiarity with Quantum Machine Learning and Quantum Compute technologies.
[...]
Strong analytical skills and be able to interpret data and provide recommendations to the leadership team

results.title: Data and AI Engineer, Irving, United States of America | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Data and AI Engineer, Irving, United States of America | Verizon Careers
[...]
# Data and AI Engineer
[...]
Verizon’s Exposure and Vulnerability Management (EVM) team is seeking a Data & AI Engineer to lead the development, implementation, and intelligent automation of our security data system. In this role, you will be the hands-on driving force building scalable data pipelines, Creating Data Dashboards, Reports and developing Artificial Intelligence (AI) models to predict, prioritize, cybersecurity vulnerabilities.
[...]
While your primary focus will be engineering robust data and AI Reporting systems, strong architectural capabilities are a major plus. You will have the opportunity to influence the blueprint of how diverse asset data is structured and meaningfully delivered.
[...]
By engineering data models and AI pipelines, the role will help ensure our infrastructure is ready for predictive analytics and that our reporting solutions provide proactive, AI-driven insights rather than just historical data.
[...]
Data Modeling & Architecture: Designing and implementing comprehensive data models (conceptual, logical, physical) that normalize and dimensionalize complex security data across numerous sources, optimized for both BI and AI workloads.
[...]
System Integration & Hub Strategy: Onboarding of new data sources and Systems of Record (SoR) into the Cyber Data Hub, ensuring data is clean, transformed, labeled, and optimized for LLM/ML consumption.
[...]
Framework Development: Creating reusable, automated frameworks and MLOps workflows for data processing to ensure low-touch reporting as well as building sustainable AI-driven insights.
[...]
Analytics & Data Science Partnership: Collaborating with the Analytics-as-a-Service and Data Science teams to engineer the underlying data structures that enable self-service BI and seamless predictive model training.
[...]
Data Integrity & Governance: Implementing strict data quality checks, compliance safeguards, and bias-mitigation code to ensure the absolute integrity of AI inputs and EVM reporting.
[...]
You are a builder with a vision—someone who views data through the lens of security risk and creating ways to automate complex problems. You should be deeply analytical, thrilled by optimizing massive datasets, and eager to leverage AI to stay ahead of emerging threats. You flourish in fast-paced environments and possess the technical credibility to guide both engineering execution and architectural direction.
[...]
Five or more years of relevant work experience in data engineering, AI/ML infrastructure, or data architecture.
[...]
Experience designing high-level data blueprints, system topology, and enterprise-wide data strategies.
[...]
Experience scripting with Python (including libraries like Pandas, NumPy) and SQL for complex data manipulation and engineering.
[...]
Proven experience building enterprise-grade production pipelines using modern data orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, Prefect, or cloud-native tools).
[...]
Experience optimizing data layers for BI tools (Looker, Tableau, Power BI) and integrating pipelines with modern AI platforms.
[...]
Exceptional ability to translate client needs into achievable technical requirements and present AI/data roadmaps to executive leadership.
[...]
Hands-on experience fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks for security logs, or developing predictive risk-scoring algorithms.
[...]
Network, Cloud
[...]
Experience managing large-scale data and AI engineering/architecture within the telecommunications industry or a Fortune 500 company.
[...]

results.title: Engr III Spec-AI Science, Chennai, India | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Engr III Spec-AI Science, Chennai, India | Verizon Careers

Data Intelligence

# Engr III Spec-AI Science

- Chennai, India
- Hyderabad, India

Job ID: r-1095372

Apply prior to the end date: June 30, 2026

### When you join Verizon

You want more out of a career. A place to share your ideas freely — even if they’re daring or different. Where the true you can learn, grow, and thrive. At Verizon, we power and empower how people live, work and play by connecting them to what brings them joy. We do what we love — driving innovation, creativity, and impact in the world. Our V Team is a community of people who anticipate, lead, and believe that listening is where learning begins. In crisis and in celebration, we come together — lifting our communities and building trust in how we show up, everywhere & always. Want in? Join the #VTeamLife.

What you'll be doing…

As an Engineer III Specialist in AI Science, you will be a key hands-on contributor responsible for the implementation, testing, and maintenance of AI/ML solutions that power the autonomous network operations platform. This role supports the core strategy of transitioning from reactive, queue-based work to continuous, 24/7 autonomous network coverage. You will be responsible for developing and deploying production-grade AI driven Agents that operate within the five layers of autonomous agents, focusing on data processing, feature engineering, and implementation of algorithms that detect issues, aggregate impact, and generate evidence-based insights.

Develop and implement components of AI/ML solutions using Python and CI/CD practices.

Contribute to building scalable and efficient AI Agents for large-scale data processing.

Implement and analyze the performance of established algorithms, including those from deep learning and generative AI.

Write complex queries using SQL/BigQuery to extract data and build features necessary to train models and derive business insights.

Assist in designing and implementing AI/ML pipelines for model training and deployment.

Collaborate effectively with team members to deliver high-quality, impactful autonomous solutions.

What we're looking for…

You'll need to have:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field or four or more year of work experience.

Three or more yeas of relevant work experience.

Two or more years of experience developing and implementing AI/ML solutions.

Strong programming skills in Python and Spark, with experience in CI/CD practices.

Experience with public cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and distributed computing.

Understanding of AI/ML algorithms, including deep learning and generative AI techniques.

Experience working with GCP, BigQuery/SQL, Python, and Spark.

Even better if you have one or more of the following:

Experience in building scoring models and anomaly detection solutions.

Experience with developing and deploying machine learning models to production.

Familiarity with the telecommunications industry data and network domain.

If Verizon and this role sound like a fit for you, we encourage you to apply even if you don’t meet every “even better” qualification listed above.

### Where you’ll be working

In this hybrid role, you'll have a defined work location that includes work from home and assigned office days set by your manager.

### Scheduled Weekly Hours

40

### Equal Employment Opportunity

Verizon is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, gender, disability or any other legally protected characteristics.

### Director - AI/ML Engineering

- Basking Ridge + 8 locations
- Technology

### Cell Site Engineer

- New York
- Technology

- Temple Terrace + 2 locations
- Technology

# Distinguished Engineer-Emerging Commercial Platforms
[...]
The Distinguished Engineer for Emerging Commercial Platforms - Reward and Pay serves as the primary technical architect and strategic partner in the Employee Experience organization. You will be responsible for the technical vision and system design of our global compensation product stack, spanning Workday Base Comp., PeopleSoft Advanced Comp., and Sales/Associate Compensation systems.
[...]
This is a high-impact leadership role where you will translate Board-level compensation product functions into robust, automated technical roadmaps. You will navigate the complexities of legacy system parity while pioneering the future of "zero-bottleneck" compensation cycles.
[...]
Workday Ecosystem: Architect advanced automation solutions using Workday Extend and Studio to streamline comp events like merit cycles, recognition, incentive management and eliminate manual bottlenecks for thousands of global managers.
[...]
Compensation Engineering (Sales & Associate)
[...]
Design and optimize high-throughput engines for Sales Compensation and Associate Compensation.

Evaluate emerging technologies to determine their potential impact on commercial platform efficiency.

results.title: AI Product Owner job at Verizon in Lone Tree, CO | Quickswoop
highlights:
AI Product Owner job at Verizon in Lone Tree, CO | Quickswoop
[...]
# AI Product Owner job at Verizon in Lone Tree, CO
[...]
Title: AI Product Owner
[...]
We are seeking a strategic and technical AI Product Owner to serve as the primary architect for key "AI-First" internal marketing products. This is a high-impact, hybrid role for a "player-coach" who refuses to choose between strategy and code. You will not just own the roadmap; you will lead the technical development of agentic workflows, conversational data interfaces, and automated content engines. You will be responsible for the full lifecycle: from identifying $100M+ growth opportunities with leadership to personally engineering the LLM guardrails and MLOps pipelines that bring those opportunities to life. We are not looking for someone to manage a team that builds; we are looking for the lead builder who sets the standard for the organization.
[...]
Own the long-term AI product vision, identifying high-friction areas in marketing (e.g., audience discovery) and architecting AI-powered solutions to solve them.
[...]
Lead rapid prototyping (POCs) by personally developing initial versions of AI agents, using Python, LangChain, or similar frameworks to prove value before scaling.
[...]
Prioritize the AI backlog, making decisive trade-offs based on both
[...]
Full-Stack AI Development & Ownership...
[...]
Build and maintain the core AI capabilities ensuring they are scalable, reusable, and have easy integration across common marketing/sales tech stacks.
[...]
Engineer RAG pipelines and context-aware systems that democratize data access for non-technical users, reducing "time-to-insight" from weeks to minutes.
[...]
Develop and code automated "human-in-the-loop" guardrails to ensure all AI-generated content meets legal, privacy, and brand-safety standards.
[...]
Establish MLOps best practices for the squad, including versioning datasets, monitoring model drift, and managing deployment cycles.
[...]
Define and track Success Metrics that matter: from 20% capacity unlocks (FTE) to technical KPIs like throughput and hallucination rates.
[...]
Communicate complex technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders, evangelizing AI solutions to drive organization-wide adoption.
[...]
The ideal candidate is a technical architect with a business brain. You are likely an engineer who found yourself obsessed with the "why" and "how much value," or a Product Manager who never stopped coding and started building their own tools. You thrive in ambiguity and prefer shipping code to making slide decks. You are a "systems thinker" who understands that a great model is useless without a great workflow around it.
[...]
Six or more years of hands-on experience building/deploying Machine Learning or AI systems or proven track record as a Product Owner/Manager, with the ability to manage a complex, technical backlog and lead engineering squads.
[...]
Experience working with LLM architectures, Prompt Engineering, and RAG systems as a daily part of your current role.
[...]
12+ years of total experience, with at least 5 years of hands-on experience building/deploying Machine Learning or AI systems or proven track record as a Product Owner/Manager, with the ability to manage a complex, technical backlog and lead engineering squads.
[...]
Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI, or a related technical field.
[...]
Advanced proficiency in Python and experience with AI frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, PyTorch, or TensorFlow).
[...]
Experience building "Agentic" ecosystems where multiple AI agents collaborate on complex tasks.
[...]
Experience with Cloud Data stacks (BigQuery, Snowflake) and integrating AI into enterprise MarTech (CRM, CMS).
[...]
Technologies (PET
[...]

[...]
PR/CCPA).
[...]
Contributions to open-source AI projects or a portfolio of deployed generative AI applications.

results.title: Senior Software Engineer Network Security, Ashburn, United States of America | Verizon Careers
highlights:
Senior Software Engineer Network Security, Ashburn, United States of America | Verizon Careers
[...]
# Senior Software Engineer Network Security
[...]
The Customer Router Security team is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Software Engineer to join our Network Security Engineering team. We are responsible for protecting the global Verizon network backbone against distributed denial of service attacks as well as managing its public key infrastructure. In this senior role, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining the robust, scalable, and secure software systems that protect our global infrastructure. You will act as a technical leader, guiding architectural decisions, mentoring junior engineers, and collaborating across teams to defend against evolving cyber threats.
[...]
If you are passionate about low-level networking, high-performance computing, and building bulletproof security systems, we want you on our team.
[...]
Stress-Test Innovation: Rapidly adapt to emerging technologies, conduct rigorous "test-to-failure" evaluations on new hardware/software, and present strategic recommendations to decision-makers.
[...]
’re looking for....
[...]
You’ll need to have:
[...]
Bachelor’s degree or four or more years of relevant work experience demonstrated through one or a combination of work and/or military experience, or specialized training.
[...]
Strong programming skills in Python, coupled with hands-on experience using Ansible for configuration management and automation.
[...]
Proven, hands-on experience building custom solutions and RESTful APIs using Django.

# Engr II-Ntwk Engring
[...]
You'll be managing and supporting enterprise customers for their business-critical services. You will be responsible for a wide range of activities surrounding the ongoing maintenance and expert level support of Verizon Managed Services customer networks, primarily Incident and Change Management. These activities will include the troubleshooting and resolution of highly complex network issues, complex change management, working with vendors and internal organizations (IT NOC, Engineering, PMO, etc.) on product wide issues as well as product readiness projects.
[...]

[...]
Experience in Cell Site RAN deployments and upgrades
[...]
Experience with Oracle/SQL database administration
[...]
Ability to quickly learn, adapt, and convert code to new scripting languages
[...]
Working experience in Python (Pandas, Requests, NumPy, Paramiko (for SSH/Network)).
[...]
Working experience in Programming Concepts - REST API integration, JSON/XML parsing, Error handling, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
[...]
Messaging Streaming Technologies - Apache Pulsar or Kafka
[...]
Basics of AL / ML - Frameworks ( Scikit-learn, Pandas & NumPy PyTorch ), NLP , LLM , Prompt Engineering, RAG, Vector DB
